Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion For Court Judgment Against Mckinley Medical, Llc
Off Calendar Dec-04-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant McKinley Medical, LLC.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Brittni Christopher, CSR #10791. Telephone: 415-551-3745. Email: bchristopher@sftc.org.

Marc O. Stern, Esq. appeared for plaintiff McCall Hanks, who was not present for today's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant McKinley Medical, LLC.
Plaintiff's second amended complaint for strict liability was filed on February 17, 2016 and served on February 17, 2018.
Cross-complaint by Pacific Medical ws filed on March 16, 2016 and dismissed on November 7, 2017.
Dismissal with prejudice of plaintiff's second amended complaint as to all parties except defendant McKinley Medical, LLC was filed on November 8, 2017.
Default as to defendant McKinley Medical, LLC was entered on June 10, 2016, and set aside on June 26, 2018.
Statement of Damages was served on defendant McKinley Medical, LLC on May 17, 2018 and filed with the Clerk's Office that same day.
Default as to defendant McKinley Medical, LLC was entered on August 9, 2018.
Order waiving plaintiff's appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on June 21, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff McCall Hanks, and against the Defaulted Defendant McKinley Medica, LLC, as follows:

Special Damages/Medical Expenses to Date - $78,977.75.
Special Damages/Future Medical Expenses - $150,000.00.
General Damages - $10,094,250.00.

Total - $10,323,227.75.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
